name: consent_given
label::English (en): Do you agree to participate in this survey?
label::Dari (fa): آیا با شرکت در این نظرسنجی موافقید?

name: hh_gps
constraint_message: GPS accuracy must be within 10 meters

name: age
constraint_message: Age must be between 18 and 120 years

name: family_size
constraint_message: Family size must be between 1 and 50

name: validation_note
label::English (en): Note: Male + Female + Children must equal Total Family Members
label::Dari (fa): توجه: جمع مردان + زنان + اطفال باید برابر با تعداد کل اعضا باشد

name: phone_number
calculation: Phone number must be a valid Afghan mobile number starting with 07

name: alt_phone_number
calculation: Phone number must be a valid Afghan mobile number starting with 07

name: land_size_hectares
constraint_message: Land size must be between 0.1 and 50 hectares

name: has_shelter
label::English (en): Do you have adequate poultry shelter?
label::Dari (fa): آیا پناهگاه مناسب برای طیور دارید؟

name: access_vet_services
label::English (en): Do you have access to veterinary services?
label::Dari (fa): آیا به خدمات دامپزشکی دسترسی دارید؟

name: final_note
label::English (en): Thank you for your participation. Your information will be kept confidential.
label::Dari (fa): از مشارکت شما سپاسگزاریم. اطلاعات شما محرمانه خواهد ماند.
